project.description:
Rigid tree substrate — typed leveled TreeNode value objects + a canonical JSON serialiser that becomes the universal contract for rendering any tree-shaped artifact on JS without a single line of per-tree-kind JS code.
Borrows DomOpsParty's leveled-types pattern: TreeLevel is a sealed sum (L0..L8); TreeNode<L extends TreeLevel> is parameterised on its depth. Per-tree-kind adapter records (in studio-base and downstream modules) map native shapes (catalogues, ComposedDoc segments, future tree-shaped doc kinds) to TreeNode<L> — a thin String-to-typed-wrapping boundary.
Substrate vocabulary: - Dimension(key, value) — typed metadata pair - DimensionKey — sealed; small substrate vocabulary - DimensionValue — non-sealed; extension point - DisplayLabel / LevelDepth — bundled DimensionKey constants - NameValue / DepthValue — bundled DimensionValue records - TreeNodeJsonWriter — canonical JSON serialiser
Doctrinal anchors: Names Are Types (no raw strings on the contract surface), Make It Impossible Not Forbidden (level type enforces per-depth shape), One Stone Two Birds (substrate consolidation + future pivot/grid/outline transforms compound on the same shape).
